sections.paragraph:
Milêl (from מָה וּמָה as if quidquid).-

(1) any thing whatever, Num 22:38 Deu 24:10 2Ki 5:20 with a particle of negation, לֹא מְאוּמָה nothing, Deu 13:18 אֵין מְאוּמָה id. 1Ki 18:43 Ecc 5:13 Jer 39:10 אֵין בָּל־מְאוּמָה not even any thing, Gen 39:23.

(2) in any way (irgend, irgendwie), at all. 1Sa 21:3, אִישׁ אַל יֵדַע מְאוּמָה אֶת־הַדָּבָר “let no one know at all of this matter.”
